closed_findings.issue: strategy_work is recorded as clean and safe_first_candidate, but live Git status shows an untracked configs/a_share_300_fast.yaml file.
closed_findings.why_it_matters: A stale clean/safe migration label could cause an unreviewed strategy config to be moved, packaged, or treated as checkpointed evidence.
closed_findings.closure: registry/projects.yaml and QUANT_WORKSPACE_CODEX_REASONIX_PLAN.md now mark strategy_work dirty/deferred until configs/a_share_300_fast.yaml is classified.

closed_findings.issue: The controller workspace is not a Git repository, so it has no immutable branch/tag/commit/tree audit point.
closed_findings.why_it_matters: Formal external-audit packets are more durable and reviewer-friendly when anchored to an immutable Git tag.
closed_findings.closure: quant proj is checkpointed locally with branch main and tag quant-workspace-controller-audit-20260703. It is not remote-published unless a remote is later configured and pushed.

validation_results.check: YAML parse and referenced path existence for registry/projects.yaml

validation_results.summary: documentation-only mentions; no secret values observed
strategy_work has untracked configs/a_share_300_fast.yaml and is now documented as dirty/deferred
local Git checkpoint/tag prepared for quant proj
